summary: An opinionated Gradle-based toolchain for defining, documenting, and code-generating JVM application metrics. Developers author metric definitions in YAML (namespaces, metric types, tags), and the tool generates type-safe Java accessor classes backed by Palantir Tritium (Dropwizard Metrics wrapper). The schema is defined via Conjure and compiled into Conjure-generated Java objects. Produces markdown documentation and embeds metric-schema JSON in JARs. This is purely an operational telemetry/instrumentation library with zero connection to the Palantir Ontology, Foundry platform, or OSDK.

apiSurface.name: MetricSchema (Conjure type)
apiSurface.description: Top-level schema object with namespaces (map<string, MetricNamespace>) and options (map<string, string> for javaPackage, javaVisibility).

apiSurface.name: MetricNamespace (Conjure type)
apiSurface.description: A logical grouping of metrics sharing a name prefix. Contains shortName, docs, tags (list<TagDefinition>), and metrics (map<string, MetricDefinition>).

apiSurface.name: MetricDefinition (Conjure type)
apiSurface.description: Single metric declaration with type (MetricType enum), tags (set<string>), tagDefinitions (list<TagDefinition>), and docs.

apiSurface.name: MetricType (Conjure enum)
apiSurface.description: Enum of supported metric types mapping to Dropwizard Metrics: COUNTER, GAUGE, METER, TIMER, HISTOGRAM.

apiSurface.name: TagDefinition (Conjure type)
apiSurface.description: Defines a metric tag with name (string), optional docs, and optional constrained values (set<TagValue>).

apiSurface.name: TagValue (Conjure type)
apiSurface.description: A predefined tag value with value (string) and optional docs.

apiSurface.name: JavaGenerator
apiSurface.description: Entry point for code generation. Parses metric YAML files and generates typed Java utility classes per namespace using JavaPoet, with staged builders for multi-tag metrics.

apiSurface.name: Gradle Plugin (com.palantir.metric-schema)
apiSurface.description: Gradle plugin providing generateMetrics and generateMetricsMarkdown tasks. Locates YAML definitions in src/main/metrics and produces Java sources and documentation.

architecturePatterns.description: The metric schema types (MetricSchema, MetricNamespace, MetricDefinition, etc.) are defined in a Conjure YAML file and auto-generated into Java objects. This is the same Conjure IDL used across Palantir's service ecosystem but applied here to a build-time tool, not a runtime API.

architecturePatterns.pattern: YAML DSL to typed Java code generation
architecturePatterns.description: Users author metrics in a simple YAML DSL (src/main/metrics/*.yml) and the Gradle plugin generates type-safe Java utility classes with staged builders, enforcing compile-time correctness for tag ordering and metric names.

architecturePatterns.pattern: Staged builder pattern for tag safety
architecturePatterns.description: When metrics have multiple tags, the generator produces staged builders (one interface per tag) so tag values cannot be confused or reordered. This is a design decision to prevent silent data errors.
All metric definitions are embedded in the output JAR as metric-schema/metrics.json, enabling runtime discovery and tooling integration without additional configuration.

typeDefinitions.name: MetricSchema
typeDefinitions.description: Root schema: namespaces (map<string, MetricNamespace>) + options (map<string, string>).

typeDefinitions.name: MetricNamespace
typeDefinitions.description: Namespace containing shortName, docs, tags, and metrics map.

typeDefinitions.name: MetricDefinition
typeDefinitions.description: Individual metric: type (enum), tags, tagDefinitions, docs.

typeDefinitions.name: MetricType
typeDefinitions.description: COUNTER | GAUGE | METER | TIMER | HISTOGRAM (maps to Dropwizard/Tritium types).

typeDefinitions.name: TagDefinition
typeDefinitions.description: Tag with name, optional docs, and optional constrained value set.

typeDefinitions.name: TagValue
typeDefinitions.description: Predefined tag value with string value and optional docs.

typeDefinitions.name: Documentation
typeDefinitions.description: Alias for string. Markdown syntax supported.

palantirInternal: com.palantir.tritium (Dropwizard Metrics wrapper - tagged metric registry)
com.palantir.conjure.java (Conjure Java code generation and serialization)
